title: T Was Later When The Summer Went
content:
'T WAS later when the summer went
    Than when the cricket came,
    And yet we knew that gentle clock
    Meant nought but going home.

    'T was sooner when the cricket went
    Than when the winter came,
    Yet that pathetic pendulum
    Keeps esoteric time.
meaning:
"T Was Later When The Summer Went" is a quintessential example of Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
